findings.contradictory_results: Two contradictory empirical results without reconciliation: r=+0.35 (p<0.001) vs p=0.299
findings.beta_20_contradiction: Low-absorption significantly MORE steerable at beta=20 (p=0.015), contradicts null framing
findings.entanglement_hypothesis_orphaned: Hypothesis designed to explain r=+0.35 finding which was abandoned
